name: Hobgoblin Warrior

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.text: The hobgoblin has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hobgoblin’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn’t have the Incapacitated condition.

text:
# Hobgoblin Warrior

*Medium Fey (Goblinoid), Lawful Evil*

### Actions

**Longsword.** Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 12 (2d10 + 1) Slashing damage.

**Longbow.** Ranged Attack Roll: +3, range 150/600 ft. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) Piercing damage plus 7 (3d4) Poison damage.
